summary: An absolutely stunning venue! The team at Sangeeth Grand managed every detail of our wedding flawlessly. The food was incredible and the décor exceeded our wildest expectations.
The perfect balance of luxury and affordability. We hosted our daughter's engagement here and the separate dining lounge made the entire evening flow seamlessly. Highly recommended.
Exceptional culinary experience. The in-house catering team provided a bespoke multi-course feast that our guests are still raving about.
